raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally dispute an unauthorized charge on my credit card account I did not authorize this transaction, nor did I receive any goods or services related to it. 

This charge was made by a former employee without my permission. As soon as I became aware of the unauthorized use, I took immediate steps to secure my account. I request that this charge be removed from my account and that a fraud investigation be conducted. 

I kindly ask that you respond to this dispute in writing and confirm the resolution as soon as possible. 

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. I appreciate your assistance in resolving this unauthorized charge.
